steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Because lines $l$ and $m$ are parallel, the corresponding angle in the smaller triangle equals $y$. Since $y=20$, that angle is $20^\circ$.

steps.title: Use the triangle sum
steps.content:
The angles in the smaller triangle sum to $180^\circ$. With $z=60$, solve for $x$.
$$20+x+60=180$$
$$x=100$$
The answer is B.
